task_description: Add multiple event handling to the Flight Card Scanner. Split app config from event config. Discover events from config.json files in the events directory tree. Serve each event under /events/{path}/ prefix. Add events listing page, lazy event loading with idle timeout, admin refresh button, nav updates, and descriptive page titles.

verification.summary: 410 tests pass (including 83 new tests across test_config_split.py, test_event_manager.py, and test_multi_event_routing.py). 2 pre-existing flaky test failures in unmodified files. Docker build skipped. All v1 and v2 review issues fixed (SSL null crash, concurrency guard, empty-slug edge case, read-only enforcement, QR code server config).
